induction_input: The cake the chef baked cooled.
The bill the senator sponsored passed.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The plan the team developed succeeded.
The dog the trainer released ran.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences using a center-embedded object relative clause (no relative pronoun) followed by a simple intransitive past-tense verb: "The [noun] the [noun] [transitive verb] [intransitive verb]."
induced_prompt: Write sentences using a center-embedded object relative clause (no relative pronoun) followed by a simple intransitive past-tense verb: "The [noun] the [noun] [transitive verb] [intransitive verb]."
l2_sentences: The book the student read disappeared.
The cake the chef baked vanished.
The letter the spy wrote burned.
The car the mechanic fixed stalled.
The painting the artist sold returned.
l1_sentences: The cake the chef baked cooled.
